title: [SCCP] Correct range calculation for get.vector.length to use getUnsignedMax instead of getUpper.
author: topperc
description:
getUpper returns 1 more than the maxium value included in the range.
This may be 0. We should not use this in a umin. Instead we should
get the maximum value included in the range and use that for the umin.
Then convert that to Upper for the new range by adding 1.

The test was manually reduced from a downstream failure, but I couldn't
get it behave exactly the same way without more instructions. It should
be enough to show an incorrect range being calculated.

Fixes #176471

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: vscale_range(16,1024)
define i32 @incorrect_result_range(i32 %x) #0 {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %offset = phi i32 [ 1, %entry ], [ %offset.next, %loop ]
  %add = add nuw nsw i32 %offset, 3
  %len = call i32 @llvm.experimental.get.vector.length.i32(i32 %add, i32 4, i1 true)
  %offset.next = add nuw nsw i32 %offset, 4
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i32 %iv, 4
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv.next, %x
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret i32 %len
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.experimental.get.vector.length.i32(i32, i32 immarg, i1 immarg) #1

attributes #0 = { vscale_range(16,1024) }
attributes #1 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none) }

define i32 @count_le_max_lanes_scalable_unknown() {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ 16, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %x = call i32 @llvm.experimental.get.vector.length.i32(i32 %iv, i32 4, i1 true)
  %iv.next = sub i32 %iv, %x
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv.next, 0
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret i32 %x
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.experimental.get.vector.length.i32(i32, i32 immarg, i1 immarg) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none) }

comments.author: topperc
comments.body:
> LGTM, I think this should be backported

Agree. Or we could revert the original patch on the branch if we think that is safer.
